creator: ports@skyforge.at
text:
Created attachment 224612
net-im/py-matrix-synapse: Update to 1.32.2

This patch updates py-matrix-syanpse to 1.32.2. Aside from the version bump, the only noticable change is the removal of the dependency on mock, which has been replaced by using the standard library version.

portlint: "OK" (3 Warnings, none new)
testport: OK (poudriere: 122amd64)
do-test: OK (Ran 1597 tests in 728.956s, PASSED (skips=35, successes=1562))

The resulting port has been running fine in production for a few days. :)
